description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On a major USDT‑margined perpetual contract, place an isolated 5x leveraged long limit order using 100 USDT margin with the limit price set 1% below the current last price and attach a take‑profit 2% above and a stop‑loss 1% below that limit price.

target_names: BTC Perpetual 5x Isolated Long Limit Order

tasks.instruction: Among the two USDT‑margined perpetual contracts with the highest 24‑hour trading volume, open an isolated 3x leveraged short market order using exactly 200 USDT margin on the one with the larger 24‑hour volume.

target_names: Higher‑Volume Contract 3x Isolated Short Market Order

tasks.instruction: From USDT‑margined perpetuals that are classified as altcoins, have a last price under 5 USDT, and open interest above 50,000,000 USDT, add the three contracts with the highest open interest to your favorites watchlist.

tasks.instruction: On an altcoin USDT‑margined perpetual contract, open an isolated 10x leveraged short position using 300 USDT margin with a market order, then place a limit buy order to close exactly 50% of that position at a price 1.5% below the position’s average entry price.

target_names: SOL 10x Isolated Short Market Open Order
SOL 10x Short Half Close Limit Order

tasks.instruction: Open a small long position on a major USDT‑margined perpetual contract with 2x cross margin using 100 USDT margin, then convert that position to isolated margin with 8x leverage while keeping the margin amount at 100 USDT.

target_names: BTC 2x Cross Long Market Open Order

tasks.instruction: In your derivatives trade history for the last 30 days, filter for closed trades, sort them by realized profit, and open the trading chart for the contract associated with the trade that has the highest positive realized PnL.

tasks.instruction: On the USDT‑margined perpetual contract with the highest 24‑hour trading volume, create two separate price alerts on the last traded price: one that triggers when price goes above 75,000 USDT and another when it goes below 60,000 USDT, both using in‑app notification.

tasks.instruction: Using the derivatives fee calculator, compare maker (limit) versus taker (market) fees for a 10,000 USDT notional trade at 5x leverage on a major USDT‑margined perpetual contract, then on that contract’s trading page select the order type with the lower estimated fee in the order form.

tasks.instruction: After opening a small leveraged long position on a USDT‑margined perpetual contract, place a stop‑limit sell order for your full position size with the stop price 5% below the current last price and the limit price 6% below the current last price.

target_names: ETH 3x Cross Long Market Open Order
